tweets.full_text:
Christopher Nolan's $250 million movie depends on one building in Burbank, 41 theaters worldwide, and roughly 90 people on Earth who know how to run the projector.

The Odyssey is the first feature shot entirely on IMAX film, and FotoKem is the last lab anywhere that can make the

tweets.full_text:
Germany has launched one of the world's best open-source AI models.

Soofi S, made by the Soofi consortium, is a 30B parameter model fully trained in Europe and tops the ranking for open-source AI.

Huge moment for Europe, and finally some competition for Chinese open-source AI. https://t.co/UGArJkoE4e
tweets.summary: 德国推出开源AI模型Soofi S：30B参数，完全在欧洲训练，排名领先开源AI。欧洲AI竞争力提升，对标中国开源模型。
angles: 欧洲开源AI反击：德国Soofi S 30B模型登顶
终于！欧洲推出能打的开源大模型，对标中国
Soofi S来了：德国30B参数开源模型挑战全球格局

I'm 33 and I think Claude Code is melting my brain.

For 6 months straight I've had 5-6 terminals open at once, waiting on responses just to smash "enter" 90% of the time. That's the whole job now.

And it's doing something to me. A few friends and I keep circling back to the

Pro tip: when prompting Codex with really difficult /goals, ask it to "write a goal for another thread to achieve this and babysit it until it figures it out"
